_readme: Copy this file to psp-siem-export.json and fill in your values. CLI params override config values.
_connection_notes: SQL Express (named instance): HOST\SQLEXPRESS  -- SQL Browser service must be running for port resolution.
SQL Express with explicit port (bypasses Browser): HOST\SQLEXPRESS,52317
SQL Server default instance: HOSTNAME  (no backslash)
To find the dynamic port on Express: SQL Server Configuration Manager -> Protocols -> TCP/IP -> IP Addresses -> IPAll -> TCP Dynamic Ports
_tenantid_note: REQUIRED security control -- scopes all queries to one tenant. Never omit.
_batchsize_note: Rows per output file. 5000 is a safe default; lower if SIEM has ingestion limits.
_dedupe_note: Off by default. Enable only if PSP is configured for multiple concurrent writer processes.
